result.title: Calorie Counter - MyNetDiary
result.description:
Count calories, track food, and macros with ease! MyNetDiary has a free barcode scanner, personal diet plans, and Meal Scan for instant logging - all in a smart, easy-to-use app. 

Proven Weight Loss Results
• Active members lose an average of 1.4 lbs per week according to MyNetDiary Efficacy Report.
• Over 31 million users have chosen MyNetDiary for calorie tracking, weight loss and healthy eating - many switched from other diet and nutrition apps.

Recognized Excellence
Ranked #1 in Forbes Health's Best Weight Loss Apps of 2025. Rated #1 by the American Journal of Preventive Medicine. Praised by The New York Times as "simpler, quicker, and better-looking" than other apps. Featured in Today's Dietitian, alongside WW and Noom.

Why MyNetDiary Is Different
• Verified Food Database: Over 2 million foods with 108 nutrients for accurate calorie, macro and micronutrient tracking.
• Fastest logging: we logged 127 foods in every major app. MyNetDiary took 31% fewer taps than the most popular calorie tracker.
• Simple & Generous: barcode scanning, food diary, calorie calculator, and meal tracker. No ads, no account required.
• AI Diet Coach combines our 20 years of expertise in helping people lose weight with the power of best-in-class AI. It’s a completely optional, surprisingly smart, and supportive assistant for your diet success.

Free Calorie Counter - weight loss made simple
• Easy food diary, exercise tracker and water log.
• Barcode scanner for packaged foods.
• Food Label scanner: snap any food label, the app logs all the nutrients instantly.
• Daily coaching tips and meal reminders.
• Shopping Lists.
• Inspiring community with daily success stories.
• Customizable weight loss dashboard.
• Nutrition articles written by Registered Dietitians and how-to videos.
• Professional Connect: share your diary with your dietitian, coach, or doctor.
• Wear OS app for your watch with tiles and complications: log foods and amounts by voice, track water intake and body weight, and view a quick daily summary with a macro breakdown.

MyNetDiary Premium - unlock the full power of your diet and nutrition app
• Diet Autopilot: Automatically adjusts your calorie budget as you lose weight.
• Meal Scan: snap a meal photo to log it instantly.
• Macro Planning with grams, calorie percentages and day cycling.
• Food Auto Logging for your regular foods
• Fitness Tracker Sync: Health Connect, Samsung Health, Fitbit, Garmin, and Withings for automatic exercise calories and steps.
• Intermittent Fasting with multiple protocols.
• Health Tracking: body measurements, blood pressure, cholesterol, blood glucose, A1C, ketones, medications, symptoms, and more.
• Plan and track up to 108 nutrients including vitamins, minerals, omegas, and amino acids.
• Variety of proven diets with delicious recipes and menus designed by Registered Dietitians including High-Protein, Mediterranean, Low-Carb, Keto,  Vegetarian, and more.
• Import Recipes from the Internet with reliable nutrient counts.
• Meal Planner with Shopping Lists.
• Trend Analysis: Optimize your diet and reach your goal weight.
• GLP-1 Companion for people using Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound, and other semaglutide or tirzepatide medications. Emphasis on protein targets and muscle support.


Premium Plus is your AI-powered weight loss journey
• AI Coach: Your personal nutrition coach that knows your diet history, provides daily guidance, and keeps you on track toward your weight loss goal. Learn the diet and discover the app’s smarts with the AI coach. Ask anything, anytime - your coach is always there for you. 
• AI Suggest Meals: Get smart meal suggestions tailored to your calorie budget and food preferences.
• AI Restaurant Menu Scan: Make smarter dining choices with instant menu analysis.
• AI Voice Food Logging: Speak your meals to log food.

Results may vary. Not medical advice. All product names and brands are the property of their respective owners.

result.summary: Diet & nutrition tracker with barcode scanner. Track food, calories, macros
result.developerLegalAddress: 621 NW 53rd St, Boca Raton, FL 33487, United States
result.recentChanges: Enter meals faster with precise nutrition details. Just type or say what you ate, and MyNetDiary logs each food and portion. Quick and easy!
